description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-skeleton

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-skeleton/`

### wc-mcp Tools — USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `list_css_parts`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Background, shimmer color, border-radius. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. aria-busy on parent. aria-hidden on skeleton. Reduced-motion (no shimmer).
3. **Functionality** — Shape variants (text, circle, rect). Custom dimensions. Shimmer animation. Loading state pattern.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. CSS Parts. Shimmer animation. Responsive sizing.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — All API documented.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Shapes. Animation. Reduced-motion. ARIA.
8. **Storybook** — Text lines. Circle. Rectangle. Card skeleton. List skeleton.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Loading states. Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-skeleton
